sources.title: Blanka - On the Streets of Manila (Excellent Filipino DRAMA in full length)

metadata.Plot: Blanka (Cydel Gabutero) makes her living on the street of Manila from small thefts and tricks. She dreams of saving enough money to "buy" a mom. When she meets talented Peter (Peter Millari), a blind gambling musician, her life takes an unexpected direction. They decide to join forces in order to face everyday struggles. Thanks to Peter, Blanka discovers to be a talented singer and, more importantly, understands that money cannot buy the love of a person.
metadata.Actors: Don Gordon Bell, Jomar Bisuyo, Raymond Camacho
